agentChat.seoTitle: AgentChat: Salesforce WhatsApp Integration Made Easy | Rialtes
agentChat.seoDescription: AgentChat enables WhatsApp integration with Salesforce, reducing silos and enhancing team collaboration for stronger customer engagement and higher ROI.
agentChat.engageHeader: Engage, Support, and Close Deals - All Through WhatsApp. All Inside Salesforce.
agentChat.engageDescOne: AgentChat is a bi-directional WhatsApp cionversational app natively built on Salesforce, enabling your teams to connect with customers instantly, manage conversatons efficiently, and automate workflows — all without leaving Salesforce.
agentChat.engageDescTwo: Whether you’re in Sales, Service, Marketing, Field Operations, or Education, AgentChat works across all Salesforce Clouds and lets you turn WhatsApp into a powerful engagement tool for every team.
agentChat.whySubHeader: Instant WhatsApp Conversations, Directly in Salesforce
agentChat.whyDesc: Connect and respond to customers over WhatsApp from any Salesforce record — Leads, Cases, Opportunities, Work Orders, or Custom Objects.
agentChat.rapidTitle: Rapid Setup — Go Live in Minutes!
agentChat.rapidDesc: No complex integrations. Plug-and-play setup within minutes. Start engaging right away.
agentChat.realDeac: Conversations sync in real-time — whether initiated from WhatsApp or Salesforce.
agentChat.delegateTitle: Delegate Messages to the Right Team Automatically
agentChat.delegateDesc: Automatically route conversations by record type (e.g., Cases, Leads, Work Orders), ensuring the right team responds fast.
agentChat.roleDesc: Control who can chat, view, and manage conversations with advanced role-based permissions and Salesforce’s native security model.

features.title: Real-Time, Two-Way WhatsApp Messaging
features.alt: Customer chat interface on tablet and mobile showing product inquiry conversation with image sharing for e-commerce support
points: Start and manage WhatsApp conversations directly from any Salesforce object.
Automatic conversation tracking linked to Salesforce records.
Full conversation history and audit trails.

features.title: Context-Aware Messaging
features.alt: Desktop computer displaying customer service chat interface with product image sharing for e-commerce inquiry management
points: Access full customer context from Salesforce while chatting.
Share files, media, and quick replies for faster resolutions.

features.title: Supports All Salesforce Clouds
features.alt: Laptop displaying CRM dashboard with customer data management interface and organized contact list for business operations
points: Sales Cloud: Convert chats to Leads and Opportunities.
Service Cloud: Manage Cases and provide instant support.
Field Service: Coordinate field operations and Work Orders.
Education Cloud: Engage students and alumni for enrollment, advising, and support.
Nonprofit Cloud: Connect with donors, volunteers, and stakeholders.

features.title: Seamless Salesforce Integration
features.alt: Customer chat interface on tablet and mobile showing product inquiry conversation with image sharing for e-commerce support
points: Works out-of-the-box with Cases, Leads, Opportunities, Work Orders, and more.
Delegation and routing rules by record type — no manual effort needed.

features.title: Multi-Role, Multi-Team Support
features.alt: Laptop displaying sales engagement platform with owner portal interface for business communication and customer management
points: Serve customers through dedicated teams (Sales, Support, Field Agents, Advisors).
Define who can initiate, view, or respond based on roles and business units.

features.title: Salesforce-Native Security and Compliance
features.alt: Customer chat interface on tablet and mobile showing product inquiry conversation with image sharing for e-commerce support
points: Leverages Salesforce’s role hierarchies, sharing rules, and object-level security.
GDPR, HIPAA-ready based on Salesforce’s secure platform.

tableData.title: Customer Support
tableData.desc: Manage support cases via WhatsApp, instantly.

tableData.title: Sales Outreach
tableData.desc: Engage leads, close deals with real-time chats.

tableData.title: Field Operations
tableData.desc: Coordinate work orders and updates in real time.

tableData.title: Student Engagement
tableData.desc: Connect with students and alumni seamlessly.

tableData.title: Donor Management
tableData.desc: Stay in touch with donors via personalized chats.

agentChat.descTwo: Connect your WhatsApp Business Account securely.
agentChat.descThree: Map to Salesforce record types (Cases, Leads, Work Orders, etc.).
agentChat.descFour: Set roles and permissions for teams.
agentChat.readyTitle: Ready to Supercharge WhatsApp Engagement in Salesforce?
agentChat.readyDesc: Book a Free Demo and see how AgentChat can transform customer engagement through WhatsApp — right inside Salesforce!
agentChat.contactTitle: Let me know if you want a design mockup, call-to-action variations, or shorter ad copy versions!

exelona.seoTitle: Exelona™ – Salesforce for Real Estate Property Management | Rialtes
exelona.seoDescription: Exelona leverages AI and Salesforce for Real Estate to streamline intelligent property management, driving automation, insights, and operational excellence.

features.alt: Vector icon of a smartphone with checkmark representing secure mobile payment approval
features.title: 100% Mobile-Enabled
features.desc: Manage leasing, maintenance, and finance on any device.

features.alt: Vector icon showing chat window and message bubbles symbolizing online communication platform
features.title: Agentic AI + Conversational Interfaces
features.desc: AI that automates, prioritizes, and communicates.

features.alt: Vector icon depicting connected nodes and central light bulb symbolizing network integration and innovation
features.title: CRM + ERP, Unified
features.desc: One system for marketing, operations, leasing, and accounting.

features.alt: White cloud icon with coding brackets connected to network nodes on blue digital background circuit pattern
features.title: OPENAPI Architecture
features.desc: Easily integrates with SAP, Yardi, Oracle, Salesforce, and more.

properties.title: Accounts Receivable
properties.alt: Smiling professional holding digital tablet outside modern apartment building representing smart real estate and proptech
points: Automated tenant billing and late fee application.
Write-off approval workflows and history tracking.
Receipts processing and ledger reconciliation.

properties.title: Budgeting, Forecasting & Financial Reporting
properties.alt: Miniature house model with coin stacks on financial documents symbolizing real estate investment and property finance
points: Multi-year budgeting with property-level customization.
Rolling forecasts based on occupancy and lease data.
Financial statements: Balance Sheet, Trial Balance, Income Statement.

properties.title: Accounts Payable & Procurement
properties.alt: Business professional using laptop with floating digital icons representing procurement process and contract management
points: Payable invoice automation and approval workflows.
Purchase order creation and receipt matching.
Multi-mode payment scheduling and vendor management.
outcomes: Transparent spend control across your portfolio.

properties.title: Inventory & Asset Management
properties.alt: Businesswoman using digital tablet to inspect inventory in warehouse representing modern supply chain and logistics
points: Track inventory at unit, building, and warehouse level.
Manage capital assets with depreciation schedules.
Maintenance and replacement forecasting.

assetMarketingData.title: Core Capabilities
list: Lead & campaign management across email, social, and web.
Brand consistency through centralized digital asset management.
Real-time campaign analytics for property-specific performance.

assetMarketingData.title: From Lead to Lease
list: Generate leads through branded websites, landing pages, and ExelPersona.
Score and nurture leads using automated AI workflows.
Convert prospects to applicants and residents seamlessly within Exelona.

assetMarketingData.title: Business Outcomes
list: Reduced cost per lead and faster lease-up cycles.
Stronger brand recall across your portfolio.
Increased occupancy and improved marketing ROI.

aiEnabledData.title: Key Features
list: Resident move-in/move-out flows with automated checklists.
AI-enabled monthly billing and recurring charges.
Smart work order management with knowledge article suggestions.
Real-time dashboards with geolocation and skill-based technician assignment.
SLA tracking, maintenance routing, and inventory linkage.

aiEnabledData.title: Business Outcomes
list: 30% improvement in maintenance resolution time.
Higher resident satisfaction and retention.
Streamlined operations across distributed teams.

excelPersonaData.title: Top Features
list: Branded UI for each property or region.
Mobile-first design with native access on iOS & Android.
Multilingual support for diverse communities.
Real-time application status, lease e-sign, service requests, and payments.
Built-in AI chatbot powered by AgentChat.

excelPersonaData.title: Outcomes
list: Shorter lease cycles and higher conversion.
Reduced call volume with self-service access.
Enhanced resident satisfaction and retention.

excelPayData.title: Capabilities
list: Accepts checks, ACH, and credit/debit cards.
Supports one-time, scheduled, and recurring payments.
Automatically syncs with tenant ledgers and financial reports.

excelPayData.title: Business Outcomes
list: Improved cash flow and faster collections.
Reduced manual entry and reconciliation errors.
Secure, PCI-compliant transactions.

agentChatData.title: Key Capabilities
list: Natural language queries for status updates, billing, and maintenance.
Embedded in ExelPersona, web, and mobile apps.
Multilingual, role-based access.

agentChatData.title: Outcomes
list: 40–60% drop in support tickets and emails.
24/7 availability without additional staff cost.
Improved engagement and satisfaction scores.

builtData: Used by asset managers, operators, and developers.
Scalable for residential, commercial, and mixed-use portfolios.
Integrated with SAP, Oracle, Yardi, Salesforce, and more.

list.title: Enterprise-Grade Security & Compliance
list.desc: Includes SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR, FedRAMP, and more.

list.title: Scalability Without Limits
list.desc: Proven to support portfolios from single-site operators to global REITs.

list.title: Continuous Innovation
list.desc: Benefit from three major platform upgrades every year—without disruption.

list.title: Extensive Ecosystem
list.desc: Integrates natively with tools, apps, and services from the Salesforce AppExchange and beyond.
Future-proof technology stack with unmatched reliability.
Confidence in platform stability, scalability, and compliance.
Full flexibility to integrate, customize, and extend to fit your unique real estate needs.

exelona.bannerAlt: Double exposure of hands holding tablet with modern cityscape and network connections representing smart city transformation

exelona.headerSubTitle: Powering the Modern Real Estate Enterprise
exelona.pageDesc: Welcome to Exelona, the intelligent real estate cloud platform that unifies every step of the property lifecycle—from lead generation to financial closeout. Built for property managers, developers, and portfolio owners, Exelona delivers AI-driven automation, mobile-first experiences, and CRM + ERP convergence, all from a single platform.
exelona.yourDigitalDesc: Built for modern portfolios, Exelona empowers your teams with seamless collaboration, automation, and scale.
exelona.assetMarketingTitle: Asset Marketing – Maximize Leasing Velocity  & Brand Performance
exelona.assetMarketingDesc: Exelona’s Asset Marketing module transforms how you position, promote, and lease your properties.
exelona.assetMarketingBlueBox: See how top portfolios grow occupancy with Asset Marketing
exelona.aiEnabledTitle: AI-Enabled Property Operations – Run Smarter, Respond Faster
exelona.aiEnabledDesc2: Exelona’s AI-enabled property operations give you full control over daily operations with AI at the core.
exelona.propertyTitle: Property Financial Suite – Real Estate Finance Reimagined
exelona.propertySubTitle: Own your financials from billing to balance sheets.
exelona.propertyDesc: Exelona’s financial modules deliver accuracy, automation, and clarity across your property finance stack.
exelona.excelPersonaSubTitle: Custom-branded portals. Multilingual access. Mobile-native by design.
exelona.excelPersonaDesc: ExelPersona is your fully customizable applicant and resident portal, created to reflect your brand and deliver 24/7 self-service.
exelona.excelPersonaBlueBox: Design your branded resident experience with ExelPersona
exelona.excelPayDesc: Integrated payments that work how your residents pay.
exelona.excelPayDesc2: ExelPay is Exelona’s secure payment gateway for collecting rent, deposits, and fees with full reconciliation.
exelona.excelPayBlueBox: Power up your collections with ExelPay
exelona.agentchatTitle: AgentChat – Real-Time AI Assistant for Residents & Teams
exelona.agentChatDesc: Scale your support without scaling your staff.
exelona.agentChatDesc2: AgentChat is the conversational AI built into Exelona for residents, applicants, and property teams.
exelona.builtTitle: Built for Scale.  Trusted by Real Estate Leaders.
exelona.builtDesc: Whether you manage 100 units or 100,000, Exelona gives you a flexible, intelligent, and secure platform to run your real estate enterprise.
exelona.salesforceSubTitle: Trusted Infrastructure for the Real Estate Enterprise
exelona.salesforceDesc: is proudly built on the Salesforce platform, leveraging the world’s #1 enterprise cloud to deliver unmatched performance, flexibility, and trust for real estate.
exelona.salesforceBlueBox: Explore the power of Salesforce + Exelona
exelona.trustedTitle: Trusted Infrastructure for the Real Estate Enterprise

mediaina.mediainaLogoAlt: MediAlna logo with stylized human figure and modern blue typography symbolizing healthcare innovation
mediaina.lifeAIPlusAlt: Illustration depicting LifeAI+ suite for scalable, intelligent healthcare transformation.
mediaina.seoTitle: MediAIna - Redefining Patient Journey Mapping in Healthcare
mediaina.seoDescription: MediAIna puts patients at the center by mapping every care moment with Salesforce Cloud and Rialtes' LifeAI+ to enable truly connected, human-first healthcare.
rialtesBenefits: Accelerate product-to-market timelines with agile delivery models.
Enable smarter clinical trials, connected care, and digital therapeutics.
Leverage Salesforce, AI, and cloud platforms for compliant innovation.
mediaina.bannerAlt: Close-up of a digital eye with glowing blue and purple details, symbolizing artificial intelligence, vision technology, and data perception
mediaina.headerSubTitle2: Digital Patient Journey for the Life Sciences Industry
mediaina.pageDesc: MediAIna is Rialtes’ next-generation patient journey software designed to transform the healthcare patient journey. It integrates clinical, operational, and digital touchpoints across providers, payers, MedTech, and life sciences enterprises.
mediaina.pageDesc2: Backed by LifeAI+, Rialtes’ specialized healthcare consulting suite, MediAIna offers intelligent, scalable, and compliant solutions that accelerate innovation, improve outcomes, and deliver human-centered healthcare at scale.
mediaina.visionDesc: As a consulting leader in digital transformation, Rialtes believes the future of healthcare is built on connected ecosystems, predictive insights, and intelligent automation. With LifeAI+, our dedicated consulting services for life sciences, we help organizations:

commonData.title: Patient Identification
commonData.desc: Leverage AI to detect, segment, and activate the right candidates for therapies, care plans, and trials.
benefitList: Predictive models trained on clinical, claims, and wearable data.
Smart filters for rare diseases, chronic care, and trial eligibility.
Integration with EHRs and lab data sources.
outcomeList: Higher patient precision and faster enrollments.
Reduced outreach cost and better ROI.
Improved access to targeted care and therapies.
commonData.imgAlt: Visual showing AI-driven patient identification and segmentation for precision healthcare

commonData.title: Candidate Education
commonData.desc: Transforming candidates into informed partners with personalized digital education, a crucial step in optimizing the patient engagement journey for successful therapy adoption.
benefitList: Multilingual, interactive content for devices and therapies.
Adaptive learning based on candidate behavior and feedback.
Integrated care education journeys with chat support.
outcomeList: Increased therapy compliance and satisfaction.
Reduced device misuse and support calls.
Higher candidate engagement with digital tools.
commonData.imgAlt: Illustration of personalized patient education using digital tools to support therapy adoption.

commonData.title: Digital Prior Authorization (PA)
commonData.desc: Automate complex prior authorization workflows and reduce treatment delays—an essential part of seamless patient journey in healthcare delivery.
benefitList: End-to-end PA workflow automation with real-time payer integration.
Preconfigured rules for top payers and regulatory standards.
Case routing, escalation, and tracking dashboards.
outcomeList: 40–60% reduction in processing time.
Reduced manual errors and rework.
Faster time-to-care with lower administrative overhead.
commonData.imgAlt: Graphic showing AI automation of prior authorization to reduce delays in treatment approval

commonData.title: Clinical Trial Management with 360° Patient View
commonData.desc: Centralize trial operations with unified patient intelligence.
benefitList: Real-time patient profiles from EHR, labs, and wearables.
Eligibility verification, onboarding, and compliance tracking.
Integrated digital diaries and adverse event capture.
outcomeList: Better trial outcomes through continuous patient engagement.
Enhanced trial efficiency and reduced dropouts.
Actionable insights for sponsors and CROs.
commonData.imgAlt: Visual showing AI-powered patient matching to clinical trials for faster research outcomes

commonData.title: Long-Term Care Management
commonData.desc: Extend care beyond the clinic with automated, connected long-term care—empowering ongoing patient journey management and improving health outcomes.
benefitList: Personalized care pathways and remote monitoring.
Real-time alerts for risk scores and care deviations.
Multi-provider collaboration tools and mobile access
outcomeList: Improved health outcomes and patient retention.
Reduced readmissions and avoidable ER visits.
End-to-end visibility across the care continuum.
commonData.imgAlt: Image showing AI-supported long-term care coordination for continuous patient engagement

commonData.title: Body MAP App – Track Pain & Progress Visually
commonData.desc: A visual-first approach to understanding the patient’s symptoms and responses.
benefitList: 10+ pain parameters visualized in one intuitive interface.
Interactive 3D body mapping for patients and clinicians.
Longitudinal tracking of pain vs. therapy progress.
outcomeList: Accelerated diagnostics and therapy adjustments.
Enhanced patient-provider communication.
Objective outcome measurement for chronic care.
commonData.imgAlt: Graphic illustrating AI-driven mapping of patient journeys across healthcare touchpoints

commonData.title: Conversational Insights with Agentforce
commonData.desc: Ask questions. Get instant answers. Act faster—powered by Agentforce.
benefitList: Natural language queries across all MediAIna data.
Automated insights on care gaps, patient status, and trial KPIs.
Role-based access with HIPAA-compliant guardrails.
outcomeList: Time savings for care teams and researchers.
Data democratization across departments.
Empowered, insight-driven decision-making.
commonData.imgAlt: Visual showing Agentforce AI answering natural language queries with automated insights

commonData.title: Unified Intelligence with Salesforce Data Cloud
commonData.desc: Bring every interaction, record, and insight into one powerful data platform.
benefitList: Harmonized data across providers, payers, trials, and patients.
Predictive models for risk scoring, engagement, and resource planning.
Real-time dashboards and cohort analytics.
outcomeList: Smarter, personalized healthcare delivery.
Holistic decision-making for patient outcomes.
Improved population health management.
commonData.imgAlt: Graphic representing unified data system connecting providers, payers, and patients

commonData.title: Seamless Integration with MuleSoft + Athenahealth
commonData.desc: Enable a truly connected care ecosystem with secure, scalable integrations.
benefitList: API-led connectivity with Athenahealth, Epic, Cerner, and SAP.
Bi-directional data flow across EHR, CRM, and ERP systems.
FHIR and HL7 standard compliance.
outcomeList: Unified patient records and device tracking.
Reduced duplication and data silos.
Faster implementation and interoperability at scale.
commonData.imgAlt: Image showing API-led integration across EHR, CRM, and ERP systems with FHIR compliance

commonData.title: Real-Time Patient Engagement with AgentChat
commonData.desc: Drive proactive communication across the patient care journey with intelligent chat.
benefitList: Secure, HIPAA-compliant omnichannel chat for patients and staff.
AI and live agent handoffs for smarter conversations.
Integrated with PA, education, and care workflows.
outcomeList: Higher satisfaction, better adherence, faster resolutions.
Reduced call volume and improved service metrics.
Consistent experience across every touchpoint.
commonData.imgAlt: Visual showing HIPAA-compliant AI chat enabling secure communication for patients and staff

commonData.title: Order & Inventory Management Integration with ERP (SAP)
commonData.desc: Bridge clinical care with operational excellence.
benefitList: Real-time inventory visibility across warehouses and hospitals.
Integration with SAP for procurement, fulfillment, and billing.
Automated alerts for replenishment and stock optimization.
outcomeList: 360° product traceability from order to delivery.
Improved device availability and logistics efficiency.
Better compliance and cost control.
commonData.imgAlt: Image showing real-time inventory visibility and SAP integration optimizing hospital logistics

commonData.title: Trusted by Salesforce. Certified by Rialtes.
commonData.desc: Built on the Salesforce platform, MediAIna adheres to the most rigorous global security and privacy standards.
benefitList: HIPAA – Safeguarding electronic health data.
FedRAMP – Government-grade cloud security.
SOC 2 Type II – Operational integrity and controls.
GDPR – Privacy-compliant across the EU.
Rialtes Certified Security Team – Continuous audits and governance.
outcomeList: Trusted by providers, payers, CROs, and regulators.
Accelerated deployment in highly regulated environments.
Total peace of mind for your stakeholders and patients.
commonData.imgAlt: Image showing digital tools tracking patient adherence to therapy for better treatment outcomes

mediaina.contactSubTitle: The future of patient experience is intelligent, connected, and outcome-driven. With MediAIna, Rialtes empowers you to reimagine every step of the journey—from identification to engagement, from trials to care, and from data to decisions.
